use_cases: Landing page hero background with animated fluid effects
Interactive ambient visuals that respond to mouse movement
Brand showcase backgrounds with customizable color schemes
ai_summary: Aether Flow is a WebGL shader animation component built with Three.js that renders an immersive, flowing visual effect on a canvas. It supports customizable parameters including hue, speed, intensity, complexity, and warp, along with real-time mouse tracking for interactive effects. Designed as a reusable component for creating dynamic hero sections or ambient backgrounds in web applications.
